ab: hera ga mnwah myan tbran sami ki yaki mu, piyux balay ramat nuya myan naras nya, ru kbalay nniqun na tayal uziy.
ch: 昨天我跟奶奶去市集擺攤，奶奶帶了許多自己種的蔬菜去，也製作了原住民美食給大家。
en: Yesterday, I went to the market with my grandmother to set up a stall. My grandmother brought a lot of vegetables that she grew herself and also prepared indigenous cuisine for everyone.

ab: blaq kwara na squliq tbiran yaki mu, skway ru abaw ngahi piyux squliq wal maziy, piyux squliq mwah tmalam pincyakan nya.
ch: 大家很喜歡奶奶的攤位，絲瓜和地瓜葉很多人買，許多人來品嘗她煮的菜餚。
en: Everyone loved my grandmother’s stall. Many people bought the chilis and African eggplants, and many people came to taste the dishes she cooked.

ab: tnahuk nya tqitun ru sumun ga blaq balay niqun, ru syam inbgan maqaw blaq balay niqun na ssquliq, memaw mbkuw maziy kwara squliq.
ch: 她煮的玉米和糯米飯非常好吃，還有馬告鹹豬肉很好吃，大家都來排隊買。
en: The corn and sticky rice she cooked were delicious, as well as the braised pork with maqaw pepper and wild boar meat. The flavors attracted many customers, and everyone lined up at our stall.

ab: nyux tmahuk yaki mu ga, maki saku beh nya tmapih squliq. mlawa saku, “nuya myan nanak ramat qaniy, ini rpsiy iyu hazi uwah maziy.”
ch: 奶奶煮東西的時候，我在旁邊招攬客人。我在一旁大喊著：「蔬菜都是自己種的天然有機，趕快來買喔!」
en: While my grandmother was cooking, I was on the side attracting customers. I shouted, \"The vegetables are self-grown, all-natural and organic! Come and buy now!\"

ab: helaw balay wal myan suqun tgbaziy maras myan, kmal yaki mu mha, “ulung isu lokah rmaw.”
ch: 我們帶的東西很快就賣完了，奶奶說：「都是因為有你的幫忙。」
en: Our goods sold out quickly, and my grandmother said, \"It’s all thanks to your help.\"

ab: zyuwaw qaniy ga, baqun maku nanu qu qnahul na tayal, ru gmluw musa tgbaziy qaniy uziy ga ini balay k’law.
ch: 這個活動，我學到了有關原住民植物和食品的知識，並且體驗到了擺攤的難處。
en: Through this event, I learned about indigenous plants and food and experienced the hard work of running a stall.

ab: ktan maku yaki mu blaq nya balay muya rramat tayal, mqas saku balay maki balay smyaxan mu uziy.
ch: 看到了奶奶對傳統食物的熱愛，我感到非常榮耀。
en: Seeing my grandmother’s passion for traditional food, I feel very proud and honored.
